data.title: A user made $27.8 million from trading Broccoli, raising suspicion of insider trading
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: A cryptocurrency "sniper" made a profit of $27.8 million by trading Broccoli, raising questions about insider trading. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: OpenAI has updated ChatGPT (4o) to reach o3 pro level intelligence
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman said: "We have updated ChatGPT (4o), and it will soon be better. It is the best search product on the Internet, with o3 pro-level intelligence and better personality."

data.title: Today's Fear and Greed Index rose to 54, and the level is still neutral
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Today's Fear and Greed Index rose to 54 (yesterday was 50), and the level is still neutral.
Note: The threshold of the Fear Index is 0-100, including indicators: volatility (25%) + market trading volume (25%) + social media heat (15%) + market research (15%) + Bitcoin's proportion in the entire market (10%) + Google hot word analysis (10%).

data.title: Broccoli’s “No. 1 address” has currently lost $1.88 million, and its holdings account for 4.075% of the total
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst Yu Jin, the "No. 1 address" of Broccoli (contract 0x6d5...714) has currently lost $1.88 million (-36%).
He withdrew a total of 7,745 BNB (US$5.22 million) from OKX on 2/14 and then bought all of them into 40.75 million Broccoli through OKX DEX, with an average price of US$0.128.
None of the Broccoli he bought has been sold yet, and his holdings account for 4.075% of the total Broccoli, making him the "No. 1 address" of Broccoli.

data.title: KIP Protocol: LIBRA issuance and market making are entirely the responsibility of Kelsier, and the tokens will be transferred to a foundation
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News KIP Protocol released an announcement about LIBRA on X: "There is a lot of misinformation about the launch of LIBRA and KIP's role. Hereby clarify: 
The launch and market making of tokens are entirely the responsibility of Kelsier (@KelsierVentures), represented by Hayden Davis, the initiator of the project. None of these wallets belong to KIP or myself (should refer to co-founder Julian). 
After the launch of the token, KIP was invited to manage/supervise the selection of funding technology projects and provide technical infrastructure for AI programs. 
Therefore, all matters related to the launch and tokens should be transferred to Kelsier, as they are handling this matter and plan to transfer the tokens to a foundation. 
When Argentine President Javier Milei mentioned the project in an article on X, it attracted attention. At that time, KIP was not involved in the launch because our role is always after the launch of the token. 
KIP took a lot of FUD that day, including threats to me and my employees, but we were not involved in the launch and we did not handle any tokens or SOL. 
KIP Publicly acknowledged its role in the project (despite not participating in the token launch) because we are listed on the site and believe in the potential of the initiative.
As a tech company, our focus remains on innovation and infrastructure - never on token launches.
After discussing with Kelsier, we were informed of the following steps:
• All SOL issued today will be re-injected into LPs/charts.
• All market making fees will be transferred to a foundation in Argentina.
• The foundation will continue to run the project as originally planned.
All details regarding the tokens should be sent directly to Kelsier. We did not profit a single cent from today's activity.
To clarify, KIP is not in the business of token launches or market making. We remain committed to transparency and our role in promoting meaningful technology-driven initiatives. ”

data.title: Trump Media & Technology Group to lose more than $400 million in 2024, with annual revenue down 12% to $3.6 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Trump Media Technology Group, the parent company of US President Trump's social media platform "Truth Social", said on the evening of the 14th that the company lost $400.9 million in 2024 and its annual revenue fell 12% to $3.6 million. (Associated Press)

data.title: The U.S. Department of Government Efficiency has sent layoff notices to more than a dozen employees of the Digital Services Office
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: On the 15th local time, the U.S. Government Efficiency Department led by Musk has sent dismissal notices to more than a dozen staff members of the United States Digital Service. The office is an information technology (IT) department of the Executive Office of the President of the United States and is now taken over by the Government Efficiency Department. (Jinshi)

data.title: BNB Chain releases optimization plan to cope with traffic surge, will prioritize Meme coin transactions
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, BNB Chain released its first optimization plan to cope with traffic surges. The team observed that during peak traffic periods, many transactions were not included in the block in time. This means that even if users increase gas fees (transaction fees) to speed up transactions, they may not get the priority they expect.
Although there are many potential contributing factors, a key issue is that validator nodes do not always prioritize blocks with the highest overall value (i.e., the most profitable blocks based on transaction fees).
The current design of BNB Chain prioritizes getting all transactions on the chain as quickly as possible, thereby minimizing the average waiting time in the mempool. This approach works for most typical use cases. However, it is not the best choice for fast-paced, high-risk Meme coin transactions, where small price fluctuations can have a significant impact.
Therefore, the team is refining strategies to prioritize block value, especially when processing critical transactions. In other words, it will give higher priority to transactions that interact with time-sensitive (Meme coin) contracts.
This upgrade will introduce a short waiting period before the block is sealed, as long as there is enough time within the 3-second block window. This will allow validators to collect more bids, increase the chances of incorporating the best bid and improve overall block construction performance, especially during peak network activity. This change also provides more time for bid collection, which may lead to more efficient block construction.
Yesterday, according to Nansen data, BNB Chain surpassed Ethereum in total Gas fees in the past 7 days. Nansen CEO Alex Svanevik said, "As far as I know, this is the first time in history." CZ commented: "Take it slow and move forward steadily."

data.title: Su Zhu: pump.fun has the strongest cyclicality and the weakest Moonshot among Meme coin infrastructure
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Su Zhu Yu X wrote: "The strongest to weakest periodicity in Meme coin infrastructure is: pump.fun, Photon / BullX, Moonshot."

data.title: U.S. Senator Warren calls Musk a "bank robber" and accuses him of working with Trump to disband the CFPB to gain financial control
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: US Senator Elizabeth Warren called Musk a "bank robber", accusing him and the Trump administration of disbanding the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) to gain financial control. (Cointelegraph)
